violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Observed "Not for Sale" Beef and Pork in the chest freezer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Observed salad dressing in portion cups with out date marks on them.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed heavy grease build up over griddle.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed torn linoleum in pantry area.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. -Observed fly strip hanging in food prep area.
